programme.title: Philip & The Queen: A
programme.desc: ...Royal Fairytale? A heart-warming documentary that traces the extraordinary love story of Queen Elizabeth II and Prince Philip, and a marriage that helped shape modern monarchy.

programme.title: 1984: Those Were the Days
programme.desc: The year of 'video nasties', Frankie Goes to Hollywood's outrageous hit, the PM's battle with striking coal miners, and the US President Reagan's misguided joke.

programme.title: Noel Edmonds: The Rise & Fall of a TV Legend
programme.desc: Noel was the undisputed king of Saturday night television. A few years later, he was off the air and bankrupt, before launching the most successful TV comeback ever.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Grimsby, treasure hunting with Alison and David.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Hertfordshire, treasure hunting with Caroline and Simon.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Jessica Forrester are in Yorkshire, treasure hunting with Mark and Jackie and their son Jacob. Mark is a lifelong collector of curiosities.

programme.title: ** Visually Signed** Paul Martin's Antiques Showdown
programme.desc: In The Black Country, Rachel hopes local knowledge will pay off in the challenges. Will either auctioneer be tempted by a Cliff Richard gold disc? (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: When Spin's pet ant dies, he takes to his duvet cave of sadness. Will Pockets and Giggle find "another way" to help Spin with his sadness? (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: After the disappearance of Mrs Fotheringill, the twins have had no playgroup to attend. Queen Thistle becomes their new teacher. (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her playgroup friends try to decide what they might like to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dr Brown Bear teaches the playgroup what to do when there has been an accident. They soon have a patient to try out the new skills they have learned.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Pedro Pony tries to rescue Tiddles the Tortoise from up a tree, it sets off a chain of events that need several visits from the doctors to save the day.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mr Potato visits the playgroup with his superhero friend Super Potato, who teaches the children the importance of eating fruit and vegetables every day.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig wants to take Peppa and George sailing, but his boat has sunk. So they have to rely on Grampy Rabbit and his hovercraft instead.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Peppa gets her very first Playgroup Star for drawing, Daddy Pig decides that it's time he got a Playgroup Star of his own.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Dog and Danny are very excited! Captain Daddy Dog is home from the sea, and he's bearing gifts.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family borrow Grandpa Pig's boat and head out for a day on the river. All is going well until the boat gets stuck in some long reeds.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go swimming. George is a little worried at first but is soon splashing happily with his friend Richard Rabbit.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit Daddy Pig's office and meet his colleagues. Mr Rabbit works with numbers, while Mrs Cat draws shapes on a computer.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Around the World Special
programme.desc: When Peppa's family car breaks down, Miss Rabbit lends them her plane and they find themselves swept off on an adventure all around the world.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is given the very important task of suggesting names for the new baby. She thinks of all sorts of names, but they aren't quite right.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The nurse is popping around, and she decides that today's visit should be all about how to hold a baby. The nurse shows Peppa a special way for a small person to safely hold a baby.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dr Brown Bear suggests Peppa and George have their hearing checked. The audiologist discovers George has a moderate hearing loss in one ear and suggests George tries a hearing aid.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is excited to help George explore the world of sounds now he has his new hearing aid. She shows him her favourite sounds including the splashing of jumping in a muddy puddle.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig and Grandad Dog are on their boats when Grandpa Pig drops an anchor on his foot! After an x-ray and plaster cast at the hospital, Grandpa Pig needs to stay overnight.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig found his night at the hospital so comfortable, he's reluctant to leave! Peppa and Suzy volunteers to nurse him at home and make sure he's as comfortable as in hospital.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig thinks perhaps he should run the London Marathon to teach his children about determination! Daddy enlists Peppa and George to help with training - so off to the park they go.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: There isn't long to go before the big day! Peppa takes the role as Daddy's coach and, with George, devises lots of fun games to help Daddy.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's the day of the London Marathon! Peppa and family come to cheer Daddy on. Peppa and George see many runners dressed in funny costumes - and then they spot Daddy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Yumi's Yummy Honey and her beehive go missing from her farm.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: with Chickaletta inside.

programme.title: Animal Care Club
programme.desc: The cadets spend a day at The Donkey Sanctuary, Devon, where they help care for a donkey's feet, take a lovely donkey walk, and make special vitamin tea baths for them to enjoy.

programme.title: The Creature Cases
programme.desc: Sam and Kit must get a lost silver ant back home before she overheats. While silver ants may be adapted to survive the heat, they can't last forever.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: The members of the Star family each confront their own absurd rivalries.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Bargain Loving Brits in the Sun Cutdowns
programme.desc: Tour guide Gill Bird takes her party of paying guests to the Lobo Wolf Park in the spectacular El Torcal mountains. But will the wildlife make a much-anticipated appearance.

programme.title: Hotel Benidorm: Sun, Sea & Sangria
programme.desc: It's the turn of the season. With cooler temperatures, shorter days and a different generation descending on the hotels, the reception team gear up for a change of pace. (S1 Ep6).

programme.title: Holidaying with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Jane McDonald takes a trip of a lifetime, solo, to the Caribbean, and her very first port of call is to the home of Rum, Barbados.

programme.title: Holidaying with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Jane sets course for St Lucia. She's picked this island because despite its reputation for love, it's the perfect stop for solo travellers and groups alike.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Robin Williams and Kirsten Dunst star in this wild family adventure about a magical board game that has the power to unleash herds of animals on its unsuspecting players.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Robin Williams and Kirsten Dunst star in this wild family adventure about a magical board game that has the power to unleash herds of animals on its unsuspecting players.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A Harvard Law School graduate is given a job offer that appears too good to be true, and once he accepts, he learns that the company perks were meant to buy his silence. Stars Tom Cruise.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A Harvard Law School graduate is given a job offer that appears too good to be true, and once he accepts, he learns that the company perks were meant to buy his silence. Stars Tom Cruise.

programme.title: Aldi vs Lidl: Which Tastes Better?
programme.desc: Blind tastings reveal which of these budget supermarket titans has the best tasting products. Plus, how did they come from nowhere to become household names.

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: GAIL's: Inside Britain's Poshest Bakery
programme.desc: With over 170 UK branches, GAIL's is growing at record pace. We look at the impact it's had on our tastes, and our appetite to pay more for posh pastries and luxury loaves.

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: There's a clash of wealth and generations as a couple of hard-up Gen Z besties go on two different holidays in a Suffolk cabin and on a 5-star city break with wealthy Essex friends.

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Millionaire boutique hotel owners who live in luxury at their beautifully run business, swap with a cash-strapped family, struggling to make ends meet but aspiring to run a music cafe.

programme.title: My Wife, My Abuser: The Secret Footage
programme.desc: The shocking secret footage of how Richard Spencer was subjected to 20 years of abuse by his wife Sheree.

programme.title: Police: Night Shift 999
programme.desc: A student officer has the chance to make his first drugs stop and arrest. At a drive-through, an uninsured driver is pulled over. And a drunk and disorderly fight must be broken up.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser Jessica Wall are in Cornwall, treasure hunting with Carolyn and Alastair.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Jessica Forrester are in Hertfordshire, treasure hunting with Slava and Trevor.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Chester, treasure hunting with Jane and Paul.

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Ocean-bound travelogue with presenter and singer Jane McDonald, featuring highlights of her cruise from Miami, around the Caribbean to Puerto Rico.

programme.title: ** Visually Signed** Paul Martin's Antiques Showdown
programme.desc: Auctioneers face a choice between a 19th-century apothecary cabinet and a plush chaise longue. Which piece do they think will get bidders most excited? (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups start a game of building a "bigger-than-me-cake". Will the Mixmups find "another way" for Spin to see through his plan to eat the entire cake all by himself? (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: When the fairies wake up to find that their wands are not working, the kingdom has to cope without any help from magic for the entire day. (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny Pig is really pleased with all the plastic gnomes and wishing well she's got for the garden, but Grandpa Pig wishes they would all disappear.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The children are sad because their favourite teacher, Madame Gazelle, is leaving Playgroup. But a leaving party will give her a good send-off.

programme.title: Tweedy & Fluff
programme.desc: Tweedy discovers that music can really make you move and that Fluff... doesn't like that.

programme.title: Treehouse
programme.desc: After doing the 'Follow the Leader' dance with Fluff, Squiggle goes to play a fun game with Scratch and Badger, where they each in turn get to be the leader.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends Special: Start Your Engines
programme.desc: As Sodor's oldest engine, Stephen worries about being able to keep pace with the younger engines, especially since Gordon must often slow down for him.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When Hannah shows off a homemade kite, her stunts cause a barbequing accident, sparking multiple fires.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit is to be given the Queen's Award for Industry. Peppa and her friends are so excited, because they are going with her to the palace to meet the Queen.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: It's Father's Day but how will Toq let her dad know she's thinking of him all the way up in space? Maybe the Browns can help.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: The friends are forming a band and Posy gives out roles to everyone except Mo, who feels left out. She must figure out how to properly include him.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: ...Kitty Crew! While Ryder is away to fix Robo-Dog's tail, Mayor Humdinger disrupts Adventure Bay with his barking kitties.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: ...Present. It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig takes Peppa to the doctors for her yearly health check up with Dr Polar Bear, who checks her height, weight, ears, mouth and heartbeat and more.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: With the building work complete, it's time to decorate! Peppa and George have fun choosing how to decorate their new attic bedrooms. It's dinosaurs for George, but what will Peppa pick.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Join Tim Rex as he tackles kid-shaped problems with dino-sized solutions... in space! Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: A fish has gone missing from Grandad's pond and his plastic 'scare' heron appears to have come to life! Stan and Gran suspect something fishy is going on.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: A rockslide leaves Goodway, Farmer Yumi and Garby stranded on a mountain.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark offer to write Commander Cottontail's biography, following him through the jungle on an exciting expedition. But then they lose him..

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: When the fairy kingdom is left without food because there is nothing left in the treasure chest to pay the elves, King Thistle has to find a job.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in Grandpa Pig's garden. Peppa pretends to be a butterfly.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: After reading his comic book about a super bird, Odo spends the day wearing a cape and rescuing those in need.

programme.title: Milkshake! Make a Change
programme.desc: Derek learns how different kinds of weather make up our climate. At a Forest School, children paint using pineapples, and also pretend to be the wind, rain and sunshine.

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: Jen tells a story in which Noah brings his favourite storybook to school - but all the characters escape, causing havoc! Will Noah be able to catch them all and read his book to class.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Bored author Richard Castle teams up with New York detective Kate Beckett when she recognises a murder scene from one of his novels.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett investigate when the body of a young nanny is found in the clothes dryer of the apartment building where she worked.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: A story of nature helping itself in the context of climate change, with cattle rather than humans shaping the environment, resulting in benefits for both cattle and farm alike.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: On a wet farm in mid-Wales, we meet shepherd Joel and his two highly intelligent and skilled Border Collies Nessie and Joe who are busily rounding up sheep.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.sub-title: In Kent, Susan visits Hever Castle, the childhood home of Anne Boleyn; Canterbury Cathedral, the premier place for a medieval pilgrimage; and Penshurst, where she tries fencing

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Interceptors Gav and Neil pursue a pair of vehicles believed to have been involved in a raid on a car hire firm. Rob and Spence deal with a man hellbent on spitting at them.
